title: UNO Reverse: Golden Edition
description:
Resource pack that replaces default totem of undying with golden UNO reverse card with PBR materials.
Shader Compitable!
body:
## About
This resource pack replaces the normal **Totem of Undying** with a gold **UNO Reverse** card

## Dependencies
In order for the resource pack to work, you need to have one of these components:
- On **Forge** - Optifine;
- On **Fabric** - Iris Shaders
